paper_title: Edge-partitioning a graph into paths: beyond the Barát-Thomassen conjecture
summary: Conjecture 1.2 from arXiv:1507.08208, which posits a function $f$ such that $f(\Delta_T)$-edge-connectivity and minimum degree $f(|E(T)|)$ suffice for $T$-decomposition for any tree $T$, is disproved by Klimošová and Thomassé (arXiv:1803.03704): for trees of maximum degree 3 (specifically complete binary trees of arbitrary depth), no such function $f$ exists. The path case ($\Delta_T \leq 2$, already proved in the source paper) was subsequently strengthened by arXiv:1907.11600, establishing that 3-edge-connectivity is optimal for paths.

since_posted.title: Edge-decomposing graphs into coprime forests
since_posted.claim: Constructs a counterexample to Conjecture 1.2 for trees of maximum degree 3 using complete binary trees $T_k$ of arbitrary depth $k$, showing that no function $f$ can make the conjecture hold for such trees.

since_posted.title: Edge-partitioning 3-edge-connected graphs into paths
since_posted.venue: Journal of Combinatorial Theory, Series B
since_posted.claim: Proves the path case of Conjecture 1.2 with optimal 3-edge-connectivity (replacing the 24-edge-connectivity of the source paper), establishing $f(2)=3$ is achievable, and notes the general conjecture fails for trees of maximum degree 3.

internal_refs_verified.note: WebFetch confirmed: paper disproves Conjecture 1.2 for trees of max degree 3; published in Journal of Graph Theory 2020, 97(1), pp.21-33.
WebFetch confirmed: paper proves optimal 3-edge-connectivity for path case; directly addresses the ΔT=2 subcase of Conjecture 1.2.

search_queries: Bensmail Harutyunyan Le Thomasse tree T-decomposition edge-connected graph conjecture 1507.08208
tree T-decomposition edge-connected maximum degree counterexample Klimosova Thomasse 2018 2019 2020 2021
notes: Conjecture 1.2 is disproved in full generality by arXiv:1803.03704 for trees of maximum degree ≥ 3. The path subcase (ΔT ≤ 2) remains valid and was settled optimally at 3-edge-connectivity by arXiv:1907.11600. The related Barát-Thomassen Conjecture 1.1 (connectivity depending on |E(T)| without minimum degree condition) was proved separately and is a distinct result.
